title: Identity Seed-Data Population
objective: Populate the bounded shared-infra identity tables in staging with the minimum records needed to satisfy existing non-null PM/work identity references, verify zero orphaned references, and prepare for later PM/work identity foreign-key activation without modifying runtime code.
constrained_outputs: Minimum identity seed rows in staging needed to satisfy existing PM/work identity references
Coverage verification results for users, employees, and crews identity references
Row-count and UUID-preservation evidence for the synthetic employee seed records
Execution handoff with remaining readiness posture before later identity FK activation
validation_steps: Confirm the three synthetic employee UUIDs already referenced by work.assignments are populated in identity.employees
Confirm the coverage verification queries from packet 012a return zero orphaned references after population
Confirm no PM/work foreign keys are activated and no runtime code is modified in this packet
Confirm population remains bounded to identity tables only with no PM/work or org data changes
sql_permission_note: Packet 012c authorizes bounded staging data population in identity.users, identity.employees, and identity.crews only. It does not authorize PM/work FK activation, PM/work data changes, org data changes, or runtime code changes.
